slice: Integrate queue reference verification with deterministic candidate materialization.

verification.route: isolated Node test harness using the committed integration logic and its two committed dependency contracts
covered: missing commits are excluded and reported
mixed valid and invalid updates remain separable
verification.constraint: The runtime could not clone GitHub because outbound DNS resolution was unavailable; no GitHub Actions execution is claimed.

memory_recovered: Candidate queue reconstruction must be a gated pipeline: authenticate inventory, verify each update's exact output bindings, exclude invalid updates without erasing them, materialize only accepted updates, and preserve a separate invalid-reference report plus mandatory review boundary.

observed: The integration module and test contract are committed.
Five deterministic isolated Node tests passed.
The canonical queue and prior team outputs were not overwritten.
inferred: Given a trustworthy immutable inventory, the integrated builder prevents invalid output references from entering a candidate queue.
proposed: Run the builder against a complete authenticated repository inventory and retain candidate, conflict, verification, and invalid-reference outputs.
superseded: Running queue materialization independently of reference verification.
unresolved: Complete authenticated enumeration of all queue updates and exact path bindings.
Human review of the first repository-wide candidate compaction.
Canonical queue replacement policy after review.

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract operational semantics only; no raw private chat, health or pet-health material, credentials, personal identifiers, or unreviewed uploads.
